name: fantasy-baseball
description: AI-powered fantasy baseball roster management, Statcast analytics, and free-agent scouting via natural language.
long_description: A bring-your-own-credentials extension for fantasy baseball. Read your Yahoo Fantasy Baseball roster, matchups, stats, and free agents — and analyze players with Statcast and FanGraphs data. You create your own free Yahoo app and complete a one-time authorization right inside the chat (just say "fantasy start"). Nothing is hosted; everything runs locally and your credentials stay on your machine.

tools.name: fantasy_status
tools.description: Check whether setup is complete and what to do next.

tools.name: fantasy_login
tools.description: Start setup: show the Yahoo app guide and return the authorization link.

tools.name: fantasy_authorize
tools.description: Finish setup using the verification code from Yahoo.

tools.name: fantasy_select_team
tools.description: Set your default league and team.

tools.name: fantasy_logout
tools.description: Remove saved Yahoo credentials and disconnect.

tools.name: get_game
tools.description: Get a fantasy game's details.

tools.name: list_leagues
tools.description: List your leagues, game weeks, and stat categories.

tools.name: get_league
tools.description: Get a league's teams, settings, and current standings.

tools.name: get_standings
tools.description: Get the league standings table (rank, record, games back, seed) with each team's season category totals.

tools.name: list_teams
tools.description: List teams in a league with only team keys and names.

tools.name: get_team
tools.description: Get detailed metadata, season stats, points, and standings for one team; excludes roster and matchup history.

tools.name: get_roster
tools.description: Get a team's roster for a date. It defaults to a compact six-field player view; use full=true for standard roster details or includeStats=true for per-player Yahoo stats.

tools.name: get_team_stats
tools.description: Get a team's aggregated stats for a scoring week or the whole season.

tools.name: get_league_scoreboard
tools.description: Get every head-to-head pairing in a league for one week, with team keys/names but no per-team stats.

tools.name: get_team_matchup_history
tools.description: Get one team's matchup history with weekly stats for both teams; filter to specific weeks when needed.

tools.name: get_player_stats
tools.description: Get stats for one or more players on a specific date.

tools.name: list_players
tools.description: List/browse ranked players (incl. free agents) with ownership but no stats.

tools.name: rank_players
tools.description: Rank league players and free agents by a stat or overall rank, with stats (heavier than list_players).

tools.name: search_players
tools.description: Search players by name to resolve a player_key; optionally filter by availability status or position.

tools.name: get_league_scoring_categories
tools.description: Get the stat categories used for scoring in this league (e.g. R, HR, ERA, WHIP).

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Get recent transactions (adds, drops, trades) in a league.

tools.name: analyze_player_stats
tools.description: Fetch advanced stats (Statcast, FanGraphs) for a player — use before add/drop decisions.

tools.name: analyze_roster_stats
tools.description: Fetch advanced stats for every player on a roster — use for lineup and waiver decisions.

tools.name: list_probable_starters
tools.description: List probable starting pitchers across MLB for a date (opponent, home/away, time); optionally label each by Yahoo ownership.

client_id.title: Yahoo Client ID
client_id.description: From your Yahoo app (Consumer Key). Say "fantasy start" in chat if you don't have one yet.
